{{Quote|Do I look stupid? […] My six year old daughter is a better liar.|Zindra's father, Cubber Daine, to Kell Tainer|<ref name="X-Wing: Wraith Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]''</ref>}}
'''Zindra Daine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and daughter to [[Cubber Daine]], former mechanic to [[Wraith Squadron]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and [[Commando/Legends|commando]] unit.

==Biography==
Daine first acted as the third member of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[shield trio]] in [[Twin Suns Squadron]] as Twin Suns Three. She later served in the squadron under [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]].

==Behind the scenes==
Although she is listed in the Dramatis personae section of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' and, according to [[Aaron Allston]], is with the [[Twin Suns Squadron]] throughout the events of the novel, no scene in the book mentions her specifically.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.aaronallston.com/factpages/faq_starwars.html|text=Frequently Asked Questions: ''Star Wars'' Novels|work=[[Aaron Allston]]'s [https://web.archive.org/web/20150201124617/http://www.aaronallston.com official website]|archivedate=20150102092638|nolive=1}}</ref>

[[Aaron Allston]] also had confirmed that Zindra is in fact [[Cubber Daine]]'s daughter.<ref name="holonet IRC" />
